description: Standalone neuro-symbolic control and evidence-admission package for fusion plasma control research. The package compiles Stochastic Petri Nets into spiking neural controller artefacts, provides bounded controller and physics facades, records digest-bound validation evidence, and keeps facility, external-code, target-hardware, and plant-deployment claims blocked until strict artefact admission passes. Features include Grad-Shafranov and differentiable-equilibrium facades, transport and gyrokinetic research surfaces, NMPC and robust-control interfaces, formal Petri-net and Lean proof admission, WebSocket/native-build security hardening, benchmark-regression gates, public-data acquisition manifests, and documentation for collaboration and compute-validation support. The v0.20.3 public validation posture treats predictive EFIT/P-EFIT, nonlinear Cyclone Base Case saturation, external-code GK agreement, target-hardware real-time operation, and plant deployment as blocked until matching evidence exists.
notes: Part of the SCPN (Self-Consistent Phenomenological Network) research framework by ANULUM. v0.20.3 focuses on release documentation, evidence-bound claim wording, native-build hardening, benchmark-regression admission, and clearer onboarding. Earlier versions added physics/control modules, gyrokinetic transport research surfaces, scenario simulation, robust/NMPC controllers, safe RL research paths, differentiable solvers, and validation artefact infrastructure. Quantitative facility, external-code, and deployment claims remain bounded by the strict validators documented in the repository.
title: SCPN Control: Neuro-Symbolic Stochastic Petri Net Controllers with First-Principles Gyrokinetic Transport for Real-Time Tokamak Plasma Control
